Meet Our Team

Expert architects, structural engineers, and designers dedicated to elevating Maltese construction and design.

Passion for Excellence

Our team combines decades of collective experience in structural engineering, architectural design, and interior planning. Each member brings a unique perspective shaped by Malta's rich architectural heritage and modern construction challenges. We're committed to delivering solutions that honor tradition while embracing innovation.

Bryan

Malta Consultant

Architect

Bryan leads concept development and planning submissions for homes, small developments, and heritage-sensitive projects.

Peter

Chartered Engineer

Structural Engineer

Peter focuses on load-bearing reviews, reinforcement strategies, and technical coordination for renovation and extension works.

Sophie

Design Professional

Interior Designer

Sophie develops interior schemes that combine efficient layouts, durable finishes, and a warm Mediterranean feeling.

Join Our Growing Team

We're always looking for talented architects, engineers, and designers who share our passion for modern innovation. If you're interested in joining our team, we'd love to hear from you.
MaltaIntel Construction Company

Malta Intel Construction Company is a premier engineering and architectural company specialized in preserving construction heritage while building its modern future.
